what_it_does: Records metadata for an image attachment in the design-source channel, linking it to a specific recent-pitches image target.
observations: YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target URI, and timestamp.
No body content or code symbols.
standouts: The target uses a custom image:// URI scheme pointing to a pitch asset.
Attachment record is minimal and purely referential.
concerns: No descriptive caption or alt text for the image attachment.
No versioning or author provenance recorded.
notes: A lightweight ledger entry that points a design-source channel attachment to a pitch image asset.
questions: What does 'p-31' represent and how is the image URI resolved?
Is there a separate index mapping attachment ids to message or pitch contexts?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated as an image attachment record and it does exactly that; n/a beyond missing context.
intention_signals: To create a durable, linkable record of an image attachment associated with a design pitch so it can be retrieved by id or target URI.
novelty: Use of a custom image:// URI scheme for channel-local image assets rather than a file path or URL.
contribution: Provides a stable attachment id and target pointer for an image in the design-source channel, enabling later lookup and association without embedding the image itself.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML frontmatter attachment record linking attachment id att-0a53754c in the design-source channel to image target image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-31 with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog an image attachment tied to a recent design pitch for retrieval and cross-referencing within channel memory.
